mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_USERS( user_id, password, user_name, phone, email, company_cd, user_type, app_status, acc_status, reg_id, is_representative, position ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{companyCd}, #{userType}, #{appStatus}, #{accStatus}, #{regId}, #{isRepresentative}, #{position} )

INSERT INTO TB_COMPANIES ( company_seq, company_cd, company_name, company_phone, addr_kor, addr_eng, zip_code, biz_number, customs_num, master_id, reg_id ) VALUES ( #{companySeq}, #{companyCd}, #{companyName}, #{companyPhone}, #{addrKor}, #{addrEng}, #{zipCode}, #{bizNumber}, #{customsNum}, #{masterId}, #{regId} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.user_no ,a.user_id ,a.password ,a.user_name ,a.phone ,a.email ,a.company_cd ,a.user_type ,a.app_status ,fnc_get_commnm(a.app_status) AS appSttsNm ,a.acc_status ,fnc_get_commnm(a.acc_status) AS accSttsNm ,a.reg_dtime ,a.reg_id ,a.upd_dtime ,a.upd_id ,a.use_yn ,a.is_representative ,a.position ,a.user_login_fail_cnt ,b.company_name ,b.company_phone ,b.addr_kor ,b.addr_eng ,b.zip_code ,b.biz_number ,b.customs_num ,b.master_id ,fnc_get_usernm(master_id) AS master_nm FROM TB_USERS a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_COMPANIES b ON a.company_cd = b.company_cd WHERE 1=1 AND a.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USERS SET user_name = #{userName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, position = #{position}, user_type = #{userType}, upd_dtime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, upd_id = #{updId} WHERE 1=1 AND user_id = #{userId} AND user_no = #{userNo}

UPDATE TB_COMPANIES SET company_name = #{companyName}, company_phone = #{companyPhone}, addr_kor = #{addrKor}, addr_eng = #{addrEng}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, biz_number = #{bizNumber}, customs_num = #{customsNum}, master_id = #{masterId}, upd_dtime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, upd_id = #{updId} WHERE 1=1 AND master_id = #{masterId}
